com.rscja.deviceapi.interfaces

Interface IMultipleAntenna

  • All Known Subinterfaces:
    IAccessGate, IUHFA4, IUHFA8, IUHFAx, IUR4
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    RFIDWithUHFNetworkA4, RFIDWithUHFNetworkA8, RFIDWithUHFNetworkAccessGate, RFIDWithUHFNetworkUR4, RFIDWithUHFSerialPortA4, RFIDWithUHFSerialPortA8, RFIDWithUHFSerialPortAccessGate, RFIDWithUHFSerialPortUR4, RFIDWithUHFUsb, RFIDWithUHFUsbOfIR, SPUR4Linux, SPUR4Windows, UsbLinux, UsbWindows

    public interface IMultipleAntenna

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.util.List<AntennaState> getAntenna()
      获取天线启用状态(Get the antenna enable status)
      int getPower(AntennaNameEnum ant)
      读取单个天线功率(Read the power of a single antenna)
      java.util.List<AntennaPowerEntity> getPowerAll()
      获取所有天线功率(Read the power of all antenna)
      boolean setAntenna(java.util.List<AntennaState> antStatus)
      设置天线启用状态(Set the antenna enable state)
      boolean setPower(AntennaNameEnum ant, int power)
      设置天线功率 (Set the antenna power)

    • Method Detail

      • setPower

        boolean setPower(AntennaNameEnum ant,
                 int power)
        设置天线功率 (Set the antenna power)
        Parameters:
        ant - 天线号(antenna)
        power - 功率(power)
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • getPower

        int getPower(AntennaNameEnum ant)
        读取单个天线功率(Read the power of a single antenna)
        Returns:
        返回功率，返回-1为失败 (return power, return -1 for failure)

      • getPowerAll

        java.util.List<AntennaPowerEntity> getPowerAll()
        获取所有天线功率(Read the power of all antenna)
        Returns:
        返回功率，返回null为失败 (return power, return null for failure)

      • setAntenna

        boolean setAntenna(java.util.List<AntennaState> antStatus)
        设置天线启用状态(Set the antenna enable state)
        Parameters:
        antStatus - 天线参数(Antenna parameter)
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • getAntenna

        java.util.List<AntennaState> getAntenna()
        获取天线启用状态(Get the antenna enable status)
        Returns:
        返回天线启用状态，null表示获取失败(returns the antenna enable status, null means the acquisition failed)
